nasb.text: Now this was the reason why he rebelled against the king: Solomon built the Millo, and closed up the breach of the city of his father David.

esv.text: And this was the reason why he lifted up his hand against the king. Solomon built the Millo, and closed up the breach of the city of David his father.

cnv.text: 他舉手攻擊王的情形是這樣的：所羅門重建米羅，修補他父親大衛城的破口；

ccb.text: 以下是他反叛所罗门的缘由： 当年所罗门建造米罗堡，修补大卫城的城墙时，
